template_object.text-long:
TODO: Instruction: You are a CTI expert that gives precise and concise answers.

Question:  
Answer: Mitigation {coa:t.mitigates<.name} mitigates technique {t.name}.
template_object.text: Instruction: ... Question: .... Answer: data component {dc:x-mitre-data-component.name} detects {t:dc.detects.name} detects {t2:dc.detects.name} spec version {t.spec_version[_='2.1']} t.platform_0 :{t.x_mitre_platforms[0]}  any t: {t.x_mitre_platforms[?='Windows']} all t2:{t2.x_mitre_platforms[*='Linux']}

query:
MATCH (dc:`x-mitre-data-component`), (dc:`x-mitre-data-component`)-[:detects]->(t:`attack-pattern`), (dc:`x-mitre-data-component`)-[:detects]->(t2:`attack-pattern`), (t:`attack-pattern`), (t2:`attack-pattern`)
WHERE elementId(t) <> elementId(t2) AND (t.spec_version="2.1") AND ("Windows" IN t.x_mitre_platforms) AND ALL(x IN t2.x_mitre_platforms WHERE x="Linux")
LIMIT 10000
RETURN DISTINCT dc.name, t.name, t2.name, t.spec_version, t.x_mitre_platforms, t2.x_mitre_platforms
ORDER BY rand()
